title: BAM Q4 2024 10-K Annual Report (PDF)
notes: Full financial statements and MD&A for Brookfield Asset Management Ltd., detailing fee revenues, carried interest, and operating expenses.

title: Blue Owl Capital Q3 2025 Form 10-Q
notes: Interim financial data, quarterly AUM trends, management fee trajectory, and integration progress of acquisitions.

title: CalPERS Private Equity Program Update — Board Presentation (June 2025)
notes: CalPERS PE allocation increased to 17% target (range 12-22%). Total Portfolio Approach adopted effective July 2026. PE portfolio at 18.3% of fund as of Jan 2026. Direct insight into LP allocation behavior and GP selection criteria.

title: Carlyle Q3 2025 Financial Results
notes: Quarterly progression data showing trajectory toward record FY2025 results, segment-level fundraising and deployment trends.

title: EQT AB Q3 2025 Announcement
notes: Quarterly AUM and fee data, fundraising progress, Coller Capital acquisition integration update, thematic investment pipeline.

title: Partners Group Corporate Governance Report 2024
notes: Board composition, executive compensation, ownership structure, and governance framework for a Swiss-listed direct investing specialist.

title: Ares Management 10-Q (Q1 2025)
notes: Interim financials covering Credit Group dominance, real assets expansion, secondaries platform buildout, and insurance solutions trajectory.

title: KKR 10-Q (Q2 2025, period ended June 30, 2025)
notes: Interim financials for KKR including insurance segment (Global Atlantic), strategic holdings, and capital markets activity. Provides mid-year AUM trajectory data.

title: Patria Investments Limited Form 20-F Annual Report (FY2024)
notes: Comprehensive audited financial statements for FY2024, AUM breakdown by strategy (PE, infrastructure, credit, public equities, advisory), fee structure, fundraising history, LatAm geographic concentration, risk factors, and regulatory disclosures. Filed as foreign private issuer (20-F).

title: Patria Investments Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
notes: Record organic fundraising of $7.7B for FY2025 (exceeding revised $6B target by $1.7B). Total AUM grew 26% to $52.6B. FEAUM up 24% to $40.8B. FRE of $202.5M (+19% YoY). 2026 guidance: $7B fundraising, $225-245M FRE. Three acquisitions announced (Solis, RBR, WP Global Partners).

title: Patria Investments Q4 2025 Earnings Call Presentation
notes: Detailed segment-level AUM, FEAUM, management fee breakdown, FRE margin trajectory (63.6% in Q4), fundraising by vintage and strategy, and 2026-2027 financial targets ($225-245M FRE for 2026, $260-290M for 2027, 58-60% margin).

title: Patria Reports Fourth Quarter & Full Year 2025 Earnings Results — Press Release
notes: Summary financial data for Q4 and FY2025, record fundraising and platform expansion through acquisitions (Solis in Brazilian private credit, RBR in listed REITs, WP Global Partners in US lower-middle-market PE solutions). Patria now largest independent listed REIT manager in Brazil.

title: Patria Investments 6-K Current Report — WP Global Partners Acquisition
notes: Strategic acquisition of US-based lower-middle-market PE solutions manager WP Global Partners, representing Patria's first US-headquartered platform acquisition and geographic diversification beyond LatAm.

title: Patria Investments SEC Filings — 6-K Series (Quarterly Results and Material Events)
notes: Series of 6-K filings covering quarterly earnings releases, material acquisitions (Solis, RBR), and AGM proxy materials. As a Cayman Islands-incorporated foreign private issuer, Patria files 20-F (annual) and 6-K (current reports) rather than 10-K/10-Q/DEF 14A.
